Source: Perplexity API Reference
URL: https://docs.perplexity.ai/api-reference
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Perplexity Agent API Reference

## Endpoint
POST /v1/agent — Generate responses with optional web search and reasoning

## Authentication
Bearer token (HTTPBeaker security scheme)

## Supported Models
- Provider/model format (e.g., "xai/grok-4-1", "openai/gpt-4o")
- Model fallback chains (up to 5 models)
- Presets: "fast-search", "pro-search", "deep-research"

## Key Features
- String or array input (messages, function calls, outputs)
- Streaming (SSE) and non-streaming modes
- Reasoning effort levels (low/medium/high)
- Web search with domain/date filtering
- URL fetching (max 10 per call)
- Custom functions with JSON schema
- Structured output (JSON schema validation)
- Geographic search personalization

## Response
- Response ID, status, output items, token usage, cost breakdown
